title: balsamea habessinica
intro: Balsamea habessinica, also known as African myrrh, is a type of tree resin derived from the Commiphora habessinica plant, a member of the Burseraceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Balsamea habessinica include reducing inflammation and pain, treating wounds and skin conditions, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Balsamea habessinica is often used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, salves, and ointments, which can be applied topically or used orally in the form of capsules or tea.
